title: An online course
description: For each question, write the correct answer. Write one word for each gap.

content.text: During the holidays, I started an online course about drawing comics. I chose it because I wanted to improve my drawing skills and learn (27) to create characters. The course includes short videos, exercises and comments from the teacher. At first, I was worried (28) studying online because I thought it might be difficult to stay motivated. However, the lessons were clear and easy to follow. Each week, we had to upload a drawing and wait (29) feedback arrived. Some students were much better than me, but seeing their work helped me learn. The teacher said my drawings had improved a lot (30) the first lesson. I now feel more confident and enjoy drawing every day. I think online courses are suitable (31) people who cannot travel to regular classes. I hope to take another course (32) soon.
